basics.name: Byungwoo Yoo
basics.label: CTO / Software Engineer
basics.summary: Inspired by a professor's words, 'You should dedicate yourself to the country and its people because you received the best education at a lower cost,' I have been driven to make people's lives more convenient worldwide. As a core developer of LINE Messenger, used by 600 million people globally, and through my experiences in entrepreneurship and exit in the US, as well as leading AI labs at top ed-tech companies in Korea, I currently serve as CTO at Datarize.

work.name: Datarize
work.summary: CRM SaaS platform for e-commerce operators
highlights: Established technical roadmaps and managed hiring and organization for BE, FE, Data, QA, and SDK chapters
Led company-wide AX transformation and AI hackathons, resulting in the release of three AI products

work.name: Mathpresso
work.position: VP of Engineering / AI Lab Lead
work.summary: Operator of QANDA, an AI-based math problem-solving search platform
highlights: Developed and led AI-based digital textbooks used by Mirae N, Visang, and YBM (2023.02 – present)
Led multiple AI research projects (ML, search, calculator & DB) (2021.02 – 2023.02)
Redesigned search and ML services based on domain-driven design, reducing infrastructure costs by over 50%

work.name: Kasa Korea
work.summary: Operator of Kasa, a blockchain-based real estate investment and trading platform
highlights: Oversaw the development and review of various features for API servers and trading engines

work.name: Buzzvil
work.summary: Operator of Buzzscreen, the world's largest smartphone lock screen advertising platform (used by over 2 million people daily)
highlights: Developed and oversaw ad and content allocation logic for Buzzscreen
Optimized search services, reducing infrastructure costs to 1/4 and providing faster responses
As a software architect, guided other engineers in building robust and sustainable microservices using Clean Architecture and DDD without downtime

work.name: Slidejoy
highlights: Reached break-even point and secured investments before being acquired (reported by TechCrunch)
Designed and developed services using ad networks and client development, and transitioned the backend to Spring Boot

work.name: NAVER
highlights: Improved transmission rates (75% → 99.5%) as the lead developer of NNI (NHN Notification Infra), a core library of LINE, and gained experience in overseas business trips and on-site debugging
Developed and contributed the Android version of Netty, a global network library, as open-source
Introduced software design (MVP) that enabled effective collaboration among multiple developers, significantly enhancing team performance

work.name: InfoBank / Dojeonhaneun Saramdeul
work.summary: Worked at InfoBank and Dojeonhaneun Saramdeul as an alternative to military service
highlights: Participated in the development of m&Talk and Samsung ChatON

education.area: School of Electrical Engineering (double major in Business Administration)
